zh.lifeSummary: 當Ermengarde Nevers於1051年出生在法國布格尼艾福內維斯時，她的父親Robert de Nevers 1st Lord of Craon17歲，母親Blanche Avoise d Alençon DE CHATEAUDUN26歲。她於1067年12月6日與Hubert Beaumont I在法國皮卡迪艾斯波蒙特結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她埋葬在法國帕斯 德 拉 洛易薩特艾迪瓦爾。

nameMeanings.name: Nevers
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: French: habitational name from the city of Nevers in France.
Possibly an altered form of English Nevard or perhaps of its extinct variant Neverd. The surname Nevers is also found in Jamaica.

History: The majority of the American bearers of this surname trace their origin to Richard Nevers, born in 1666 in Woburn, MA. His origin is not known, but his surname is also documented in the forms Nevard and Neverds, which make it possible that Richard Nevers was of English origin.

variants.name: Nevard
meanings: English: from the Middle English (Old French) personal name Nevard, from ancient Germanic Niwhard, from niw- ‘new’ + hard- ‘strong, hardy’. Compare Nevers .

nameMeanings.name: Ermengarde
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

en.lifeSummary: When Ermengarde Nevers was born in 1051, in Nevers, Nièvre, Burgundy, France, her father, Robert de Nevers 1st Lord of Craon, was 17 and her mother, Blanche Avoise d Alençon DE CHATEAUDUN, was 26. She married Hubert Beaumont I on 6 December 1067, in Beaumont, Aisne, Picardie, France. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 2 daughters. She was buried in Étival, Sarthe, Pays de la Loire, France.

fr.Étival, Sarthe, Pays de la Loire, France: Étival, Sarthe, Pays de la Loire, France
fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Ermengarde Nevers est née en 1051, à Nevers, Nièvre, Bourgogne, France, son père, Robert de Nevers 1st Lord of Craon, avait 17 ans et sa mère, Blanche Avoise d Alençon DE CHATEAUDUN, avait 26 ans. Elle a épousé Hubert Beaumont I le 6 décembre 1067, à Beaumont, Aisne, Picardie, France. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 2 filles. Elleenterrée à Étival, Sarthe, Pays de la Loire, France.

de.Étival, Sarthe, Pays de la Loire, France: Étival, Sarthe, Pays de la Loire, Frankreich
de.lifeSummary: Als Ermengarde Nevers 1051 in Nevers, Nièvre, Burgund, Frankreich geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Robert de Nevers 1st Lord of Craon 17 und ihre Mutter Blanche Avoise d Alençon DE CHATEAUDUN 26. Sie hat am 6. Dezember 1067 in Beaumont, Aisne, Picardie, Frankreich Hubert Beaumont I geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie wurde in Étival, Sarthe, Pays de la Loire, Frankreich begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Ermengarde Nevers è nata il nel 1051 nel Nevers, Nièvre, Bourgogne, Francia, sua padre, Robert de Nevers 1st Lord of Craon, aveva 17 anni e sua madre, Blanche Avoise d Alençon DE CHATEAUDUN, aveva 26 anni. Lei sposato Hubert Beaumont I il 6 dicembre 1067, nel Beaumont, Aisne, Picardie, Francia. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 2 figlie. Fu sepolta a Étival, Sarthe, Pays de la Loire, Francia.

ja.lifeSummary: Ermengarde Neversが1051年にフランスボウルゴグンニevアネバーズで生まれた時，父Robert de Nevers 1st Lord of Craonは17歳，母Blanche Avoise d Alençon DE CHATEAUDUNは26歳であった。1067年12月6日にフランスピカーディエイスンビーウモントでHubert Beaumont Iと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女はフランスペイズ ド ラ ロイアーサルスeティヴァルにて埋葬された。

ko.Étival, Sarthe, Pays de la Loire, France: 프랑스 파이스 데 라 로이르 사르테 e티발
ko.lifeSummary: Ermengarde Nevers(이)가 1051년 프랑스 부르고그니 니e브르 네버스에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Robert de Nevers 1st Lord of Craon(은)는 17세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Blanche Avoise d Alençon DE CHATEAUDUN(은)는 26세였다. 그녀는 1067년 12월 6일 프랑스 피카디 아이스니 보몽에서 Hubert Beaumont I(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 프랑스 파이스 데 라 로이르 사르테 e티발에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Ermengarde Nevers nasceu em 1051, em Nevers, Nièvre, Bourgogne, França, seu pai, Robert de Nevers 1st Lord of Craon, tinha 17 anos e sua mãe, Blanche Avoise d Alençon DE CHATEAUDUN, tinha 26 anos. Ela casou-se com Hubert Beaumont I em 6 de dezembro de 1067, em Beaumont, Aisne, Picardie, França. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 2 filhas. Ela foi sepultada em Étival, Sarthe, Pays de la Loire, França.

ru.Étival, Sarthe, Pays de la Loire, France: eтиваль, сарт, пеис де ла лоир, Франция
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Ermengarde Nevers родилась в 1051 г. в местности нивирс, ниeвр, бургогн, Франция, её отцу по имени Robert de Nevers 1st Lord of Craon было 17 лет, а матери, которую звали Blanche Avoise d Alençon DE CHATEAUDUN, 26. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Hubert Beaumont I 6 декабря 1067 г. в местности бомонт, эисн, пикарди, Франция. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 2 дочери. Она была похоронена в местности eтиваль, сарт, пеис де ла лоир, Франция.

Se casó con Hubert Beaumont I el 6 de diciembre de 1067, en Beaumont, Aisne, Picardie, Francia. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 2 hijas.
